execution_details.stdout:
[sssd]
services = nss,pam
domains = testing.test

[domain/testing.test]
id_provider = local

[pam]
pam_cert_auth=True

[certmap/testing.test/rule_name]
matchrule = <SAN>.*EDIPI@mil
maprule = (userCertificate;binary={cert!bin})
domains = testing.test
